# stopAdvertising()

**Instance Method**

Stops advertising peripheral manager data.

## Declaration

```swift
func stopAdvertising()
```

## Discussion

Call this method when you no longer want to advertise peripheral manager data.

## Managing Advertising

- **startAdvertising(_:)**: Advertises peripheral manager data.
- **Advertising Data**
- **isAdvertising**: A Boolean value that indicates whether the peripheral is advertising data.

items.description: A Boolean value that indicates whether the peripheral is advertising data.
